channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Did This Moment at Kristi Noem’s Senate Testimony Seal Her Fate at DHS?
Noem: Looking Forward to Security Role After Reassignment
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem said Thursday she is looking forward to a new role overseeing a Western Hemisphere security initiative and tou...

item.title: Rick Santorum to Newsmax: Noem Shift Political, Not Performance Based
item.description: Former Pennsylvania GOP Sen. Rick Santorum told Newsmax on Thursday that President Donald Trump's decision to remove Kristi Noem as head of the Depart...

item.title: Progressive firebrand concedes in cliffhanger North Carolina congressional primary battle with incumbent Dem
item.description: Progressive challenger Nida Allam conceded the narrow North Carolina congressional Democratic primary to Rep. Valerie Foushee by 1%.

item.title: Nearly all suspects arrested in St Paul church storming; MLK’s niece says hostile tactics ‘not the way’
item.description: Dr. Alveda King condemned protesters who stormed a Minnesota church, saying hostility and disruption betray the nonviolent legacy of MLK’s Civil Right...

item.title: Texas' Paxton Ties US Senate Race Exit to Voting Bill Passage
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton said he would consider dropping out of the state's Republican U.S. Senate primary if Senate leadership agrees to abo...

item.title: New Poll Shows That in an Election Year, Democrats Continue to Ignore Voters on Immigration
Pentagon policy chief grilled as Dem claims Trump broke promise about going to war with Iran
item.description: Pentagon policy chief Elbidge Colby was grilled on President Donald Trump's past statements on war with Iran as Operation Epic Fury continues.

item.title: Tafoya rips Walz 'dodging' accountability in hearing, unveils plan to fight fraud: 'Full weight of the law'
item.description: Republican Senate candidate Michele Tafoya slammed Tim Walz over his testimony on Minnesota's fraud scandal, calling his responses completely inadequa...

item.title: DoW Denies Report on Hegseth-Rubio Feud Amid Wave of Fabricated Hits on Trump Admin
More Than 20 States Sue Over New Trump Tariffs
item.description: Some two dozen states challenged President Donald Trump's new global tariffs Thursday, filing a lawsuit over import taxes he imposed after a stinging ...

item.title: Authorities Release Harrowing Bodycam Footage of Austin Attack, Leftie DA Declines to Prosecute Officers
Kristi Noem Responds to Being Fired As DHS Secretary, Thanks Trump for the New Gig
Virginia Dems mandate Jan. 6 be taught as ‘violent insurrection,’ ban election fraud claims in schools
item.description: Virginia Democrats passed a controversial bill requiring schools teach students that Jan. 6 was a violent insurrection and banning election fraud clai...

item.title: Senate Democrats Block DHS Funding Bill, Extending Shutdown
item.description: Senate Democrats on Thursday blocked a Republican-backed bill to fund the Department of Homeland Security through the end of fiscal 2026, extending th...
